achievement.timelordregen.description.wa: Obtain a pocket watch — a vessel that holds regeneration energy.
achievement.timelordregen.title.watch: More than just a pocket watch!
The gods who walk in the shadows have for the first time become aware of incredible science.
advancements.timelordregen.unbearably_pa: You feel your organs growing, and your cells multiplying like never before.
advancements.timelordregen_gallifrey.des: A rust-coloured planet outside of time, its interior as rusty as its exterior — and laggy.
command.regen.fail: No regenerations left or already regenerating!
command.regen.name: Regenerate
command.regenui.name: Regeneration UI
gui.regen.settings.title: Regeneration Settings
gui.regen.settings.not_timelord: You are not a Time Lord
item.timelordregen.elixir_of_life.desc: (Grants you the regeneration ability of a Gallifreyan, transforming you into a true Time Lord)
item.timelordregen.pocket_watch.desc: A Time Lord's regeneration vessel, bound to its owner on first use. Allows transfer of regeneration charges between player and watch.
origin.timelordregen.regeneration.descri: Phantoms no longer spawn around you. A transparent hardened membrane grows beneath your skin. You can survive longer underwater and in a vacuum, and you consume less food. Additionally, your body has a way of cheating death by regenerating all its cells, but only a limited twelve times.
origin.timelordregen.regeneration.name: Gallifreyan Physiology
origin.timelordregen.timelord.descriptio: She saw the gods themselves, not as mortals see them, but as they see each other: infinite living fire, an eternal serpent biting its own tail; wheel within wheel, rotating with the same elegance as the stars in the night sky. Burning eyes, unblinkingly watching every sun and planet in creation, counting days and nights.
origin.timelordregen.timelord.name: Time Lord
